name: ExtensionCapabilityStatement_FhirVersion
title: R5: fhirVersion
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
Element `CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CapabilityStatement.fhirVersion` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Servers may implement multiple versions (see [Managing Multiple Versions](https://hl7.org/fhir/versioning.html), and the [$versions](https://hl7.org/fhir/capabilitystatement-operation-versions.html) operation). If they do, and the CapabilityStatement is requested from the server, then this fhirVersion will be either the version requested, or the server's default version.

element.definition: The version of the FHIR specification that this CapabilityStatement describes (which SHALL be the same as the FHIR version of the CapabilityStatement itself). There is no default value.
element.comment: Servers may implement multiple versions (see [Managing Multiple Versions](https://hl7.org/fhir/versioning.html), and the [$versions](https://hl7.org/fhir/capabilitystatement-operation-versions.html) operation). If they do, and the CapabilityStatement is requested from the server, then this fhirVersion will be either the version requested, or the server's default version.
